query:
-- المستخدم الذي يملك NAS (ownerId=1)
SELECT 
  id, 
  username, 
  email,
  role,
  accountStatus, 
  trialEndDate,
  subscriptionEndDate,
  CASE 
    WHEN accountStatus = 'trial' AND trialEndDate < NOW() THEN 'EXPIRED_TRIAL'
    WHEN accountStatus = 'active' AND subscriptionEndDate < NOW() THEN 'EXPIRED_SUBSCRIPTION'
    ELSE 'VALID'
  END as check_status
FROM users 
WHERE id = 1;
command:

SELECT

  username, 
  email,
  role,
  accountStatus, 
  trialEndDate,

  CASE 
    WHEN accountStatus = 'trial' AND trialEndDate < NOW() THEN 'EXPIRED_TRIAL'
    WHEN accountStatus = 'active' AND subscriptionEndDate < NOW() THEN 'EXPIRED_SUBSCRIPTION'
    ELSE 'VALID'
  END as check_status
FROM users 
WHERE id = 1;
